full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Creating visualization code for confusion matrix and per-class accuracy.

full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Generated the seaborn heatmap code and matplotlib bar chart with accuracy annotations.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that the confusion matrix correctly maps predicted vs. true labels. Checked per-class accuracy calculations.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Customized colors, fonts, and layout. Added results saving to partB/results/.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Writing the comparison discussion for result gaps.

full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Suggested key reasons: dataset difference, architecture simplification, kernel choice, scale.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Reviewed each reason and ensured it was specific to my implementation choices rather than generic.
